== Notes for [[Item:Q103144|Q103144]] ==

https://www.academia.edu/2774302/Una_familia_de_la_oligarqu%C3%ADa_burgalesa_en_el_siglo_XV_los_Alonso_de_Burgos-Maluenda._La_ciudad_de_Burgos._Actas_del_Congreso_de_Ha_de_Burgos._Le%C3%B3n_Junta_de_Castilla_y_Le%C3%B3n_1985._pp._143-162._ISBN_84-505-1272-7

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000061611089821

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
